## Resource Details

**Name:**

**URL:**

**Category:**
<!-- Which section? e.g. Datasets > Sentiment Analysis, Models > LLMs, Benchmarks -->

**Description (plain English — what is it, what's it for, why does it matter?):**

**Status:**
<!-- 🟢 Active / 🟡 Unmaintained / 🔴 Deprecated -->

**License:**
<!-- e.g. MIT, Apache 2.0, CC-BY-SA, Unknown -->

**On Hugging Face?**
<!-- Yes / No -->

**Paper?**
<!-- Link or N/A -->

**Size / other useful info:**
<!-- e.g. "~10k samples", "7B parameters", "Updated 2024" -->

## Checklist
- [ ] Publicly accessible
- [ ] Related to Indonesian or Indonesian regional languages
- [ ] Not already in the repo
- [ ] Read CONTRIBUTING.md
